articles.author: Alexandra Koch
articles.title: Michael Dell celebrates America’s 250th birthday with gift to seed the American Dream for millions of kids - Fox Business
articles.description: Michael Dell pledged $250 for the first 25 million qualifying children who sign up for Trump Accounts as the federal investment program officially launched on Independence Day.
articles.content: In an Independence Day announcement, tech billionaire Michael Dell and his wife Susan unveiled a "public-private partnership" aimed at giving millions of young Americans a direct financial stake in t… [+3020 chars]
